name: Legal identifier
description: Formal identifier (LEI, company registration number, government agency code).

name: Size band
description: Size tier (micro / small / medium / large / very_large).

name: Service roles
description: Critical-service roles the organisation fills (shelter operator, hospital, school authority, fire, police, EOC, muster, substation, water). Repeatable.

name: Registered location
description: Semantic wrapper for the organisation's registered address as a Place.

name: Registered site
description: Site resource containing the registered address.
